scripts.build: npm run generate-dependency-types && node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://{{project-name | kebab_case}}.localhost -o dist/{{ project-name | kebab_case }}.wasm
scripts.build:debug: npm run generate-dependency-types && node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://{{project-name | kebab_case}}.localhost -o dist/{{ project-name | kebab_case }}.wasm
scripts.generate-dependency-types: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('spin-dependencies.wit')) process.exit(1)" && jco guest-types spin-dependencies.wit -n root || node -e "process.exit(0)"
